✦ About me

I help brands & people connect.

I'm an energetic, results-driven undergraduate at SMU with a strong foundation in marketing, public relations, and community engagement. I thrive in dynamic, fast-paced environments — managing large-scale student events, leading communication strategies, and volunteering for meaningful community initiatives.

Driven by a passion for creative storytelling and effective organization, I'm always looking for new ways to connect people and elevate brand experiences.

✦ Experience

Leadership & marketing journey

A selection of roles where strategy, creativity, and people came together.

📣

Marketing Deputy

2026

VIVACE 2026 · SMU Students' Association (SMUSA)

  • Planned and executed marketing strategies for SMU's flagship VIVACE event.
  • Managed website content and publicity materials to maximize student engagement.
  • Coordinated internal and external communications across teams.
💼

Honorary General & Finance Secretary

2026 – Present

SMU Tax Society

  • Oversee general administration and financial governance for the society.
  • Support events, record-keeping, and member communications.
🏆

Student Company Marketing Manager

2024

Prestasi Junior Indonesia

  • Spearheaded marketing strategy for a student-run commercial venture.
  • Helped the team win "Most Innovative Product" at the Regional Student Company Competition, Jakarta.
🤝

Liaison Officer

2025

SMU Diversity · SMU International Connections

  • Acted as a point of contact supporting diversity & international community initiatives.
  • Facilitated communication and coordination between participants and organizers.
🎯

Director, Marketing & PR Division

2023 – 2024

OSIS Student Council

  • Led the marketing team to promote student council events and drive engagement.
  • Managed all official social media accounts and general communications.
  • Coordinated PR collaborations with internal and external partners.
📰

Public Relations Executive

2023

Karnightval 2023 · Karangturi Night Festival

  • Secured sponsorship deals and managed strategic partnerships to fund the festival.
  • Handled media relations, external communications, and vendor coordination.
🌱

Leader & Founder

2023 – 2024

SERU GP · Graha Padma Youth Fellowship

  • Founded and led a youth fellowship — building community from the ground up.
  • Organized programs, engagement activities, and volunteer initiatives.
